pageIntro.title: Moments of curiosity, creativity, and community.
pageIntro.description: Explore Free Code Juniors through event-based galleries that document how students learn, collaborate, and share what they build.

sectionIntro.title: Every event keeps its own story.
sectionIntro.description: Examine the brilliance of the FCJ model.

events.title: May 25 Session
events.description: An early FCJ session focused on warm introductions, collaborative learning, and helping students settle into the creative rhythm of class.

images.alt: Students beginning the May 25 FCJ lesson together.
images.caption: Students settled in and began learning together with curiosity and focus.

images.alt: A candid classroom moment from the May 25 FCJ session.
images.caption: This session captured the supportive classroom tone FCJ is building from the start.

images.alt: Students and mentors during the May 25 session.
images.caption: Students worked through the lesson at a pace that encouraged questions and confidence.

images.alt: A classroom view from the May 25 FCJ session.
images.caption: The May session showed how FCJ blends structure, encouragement, and hands-on learning.

images.alt: A closing moment from the May 25 session.
images.caption: By the end of the session, students were more comfortable creating and exploring together.

events.title: June 25 Session
events.description: The June session captured a fuller FCJ lesson in motion, with live demonstrations, student engagement, and visible momentum across the room.

images.alt: Students and mentors during the June 25 FCJ session.
images.caption: The June session opened with strong energy and clear participation across the room.

images.alt: A lesson moment from the June 25 FCJ session.
images.caption: Students followed the lesson while building confidence through guided practice.

images.alt: Students working through tasks during the June 25 session.
images.caption: This session reflected the FCJ model at work: clear instruction, active learning, and peer support.

images.alt: A classroom view from the June 25 FCJ session.
images.caption: Students stayed engaged as the lesson moved from explanation into hands-on exploration.

images.alt: Participants during the June 25 FCJ session.
images.caption: Moments like this show how the lesson environment stays structured and welcoming at the same time.

images.alt: Another candid view of the June 25 session.
images.caption: The room reflected steady momentum as students kept building and following along.

images.alt: A later moment in the June 25 FCJ lesson.
images.caption: The June session highlights how FCJ lessons balance guidance, movement, and student ownership.

videos.title: June 25 Session Video 1
videos.caption: A live classroom view showing the pace and flow of the June session.

videos.title: June 25 Session Video 2
videos.caption: Students stayed engaged as the lesson progressed and the room became more collaborative.

videos.title: June 25 Session Video 3
videos.caption: This clip captures the classroom energy that makes FCJ lessons feel active and welcoming.

videos.title: June 25 Session Video 4
videos.caption: A final lesson clip showing the real-time rhythm of the June session.
